site.title: Rachel's Quest
site.description: A journey through Tech and Art
site.author: Rachel Lim

intro: You seem lost in the vastness of the internet space.
Choose your companion to begin your journey through the digital nebula.
Welcome to the DECK! I've been waiting for you.
I'll be your guide through this digital sector.
I'll stay down here in the corner if you need any info or lore. Let's explore!
home.guide: We've arrived at the central hub, the DECK. From here, we can chart our course to any sector.
home.lore: Rachel's journey started in the intersection of two worlds. The binary and the brushstroke.

projects.guide: This is the DATA_VOID. It contains the logs of past missions and engineered constructs.
projects.lore: Each project is a fragment of a larger quest. Some were built for logic, others for soul.

skills.guide: Behold the MODULE_PROFICIENCY. Here you can see the stats and upgrades of the pilot.
skills.lore: Knowledge is the ultimate weapon in this nebula. We are constantly upgrading our cores.

contact.guide: We've reached the SIGNAL_RELAY. Input the correct coordinates to establish a direct link.
contact.lore: Communication is key to any successful alliance. Don't be shy, initiate the ping.

narrative.tech_path: You've entered the Sector of Logic. Every pixel here obeys the laws of the machine.
narrative.art_path: You've drifted into the Nebula of Expression. Here, rules are merely suggestions.
narrative.contact: Transmission incoming... Dial the coordinates to reach the source.

hero.name: Rachel
hero.title: Select Your Character Class
hero.subtitle: Developer & Designer
hero.description: Embark on a journey to discover the intersection of logic and creativity. Choose your path: The structured world of Tech or the expressive realm of Art.

about.title: The Lore
paragraphs: Every good game needs a backstory. My character build is unique—a dual-class specialist balancing the rigorous logic of Computer Science with the boundless creativity of the Arts.
On the **Tech Path**, I engineer solutions in FinTech and MedTech, wielding code to solve complex problems. On the **Art Path**, I craft visual narratives through design and illustration.
Navigate through this world to see how these two distinct paths converge into one versatile developer.

contact.availability: Quest Log: Open for new missions
